description: §23.6 positive — a library file with a top-level `<foreign lang="ts" />` declaration ahead of a bound inline value-returning `_={ 1 + 1 }=` block. `<foreign lang>` resolves the library's foreign-language context (§23.6), so the admitted block's `lang=` resolves to `ts` and the whole E-FOREIGN-* family stays silent (E-FOREIGN-003 no-lang, E-FOREIGN-004 non-admitted-bare, E-FOREIGN-005 unsupported-lang all inapplicable here).
